basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Nagpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years. Age Relaxation: The age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 (Five) years and for OBC candidate up to a maximum period of 3(Three) years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Three-year graduate degree in Life sciences + Three Years post-qualification experience or PG in Life sciences
qualification.details: Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field (Life sciences) + Three Years post-qualification experience or PG in a relevant subject/field (Life sciences). Desirable: Experience in Research Project and Research Laboratory, Knowledge of Computer Application.

selection_process: Online Application via Google Form Shortlisting Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field (Life sciences) + Three Years post-qualification experience or PG in a relevant subject/field (Life sciences). Desirable: Experience in Research Project and Research Laboratory, Knowledge of Computer Application.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years. Age Relaxation: The age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 (Five) years and for OBC candidate up to a maximum period of 3(Three) years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for Project Technical Support -III posts at AIIMS Nagpur is 28 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technical Support -III post in the AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual government job opportunity in Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Project Technical Support -III posts at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support -III post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms, and for experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Project Technical Support -III at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support -III post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28000/- per month, along with 20% Basic pay (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for Project Technical Support -III?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a three-year graduate degree in Life sciences with three years of post-qualification experience, or a PG degree in Life sciences. Experience in research projects and computer application knowledge is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment?
faq.answer: According to the official notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Technical Support -III recruitment at AIIMS Nagpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Project Technical Support -III at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Technical Support -III includes online application submission via Google Form, followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates, and finally an interview round.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III posts?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online for the Project Technical Support -III posts. The application link will be available on the official website of AIIMS Nagpur, and a direct link is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Technical Support -III post is Nagpur, Maharashtra. AIIMS Nagpur is located at Pincode 441108, offering a government job opportunity in the region.

faq.question: Q10. When was the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III notification released?
faq.answer: The official notification for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026 was released on 10 July 2026. Interested candidates should refer to this date for all application-related timelines.
